prompt_text:
### Demographics: 56-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~2.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 65.9 kg; Height 160.4 cm; BMI 25.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 138/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.9%; 9 months ago 9.1%; 6 months ago 8.8%; 3 months ago 8.3%; current 8.7%), FPG (12 months ago 200mg/dL; 9 months ago 255mg/dL; 6 months ago 194mg/dL; 3 months ago 191mg/dL; current 242mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.9kg; 9 months ago 63.1kg; 6 months ago 63.1kg; 3 months ago 64.8kg; current 65.9kg), Height (12 months ago 160.4cm; 9 months ago 160.4cm; 6 months ago 160.4cm; 3 months ago 160.4cm; current 160.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 138mmHg; 9 months ago 143mmHg; 6 months ago 143mmHg; 3 months ago 141mmHg; current 138mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 73mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 41U/L; 9 months ago 48U/L; 6 months ago 48U/L; 3 months ago 43U/L; current 46U/L), AST (12 months ago 34U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 24U/L; 3 months ago 31U/L; current 30U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 19mL/min/1.73m²; current 19mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 379mg/g; 9 months ago 390mg/g; 6 months ago 405mg/g; 3 months ago 411mg/g; current 436mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 82mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 82mg/dL; 3 months ago 78mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 54mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 166mg/dL; 9 months ago 163mg/dL; 6 months ago 144mg/dL; 3 months ago 162mg/dL; current 156mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
